arts.ttl: Unique Paris Saint-Germain Lunar New Year Snake Kit Font Released
arts.sum: PSG has teamed up with Jay Chou's PHANTACi brand to launch a special Lunar New Year collection for 2025, which brings us a special Year of the Snake typeface & anthem jacket was debuted on January 25 during the PSG vs Reims match at Parc des Princes.

arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain are reportedly interested in Aston Villa’s Jhon Durán as they look to boost their attacking options for the future. According to journalist Ben Jacobs, PSG are still keen on the Colombian striker but face a tough challenge due to Aston Villa’s £80 million asking price. arts.ttl: Chelsea, Man Utd Considering Swap Deal Involving £70M-Rated Bayern Munich, PSG Target
arts.sum: Christopher Nkunku’s future at Chelsea is looking increasingly uncertain as top European clubs show interest in the forward.
